name: Funghi Ripieni Con Lumache Lello
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Saute mushroom caps in 4 tablespoons butter for 3 to 4 minutes on each side or until golden brown. Set aside.
3. Saute escargots in white wine and 4 tablespoons butter for 10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper as desired. Drain.
4. In a blender, combine the remaining butter, garlic, and lemon juice to make a paste.
5. Place a portion of the paste into each mushroom cap.
6. Bake on a baking sheet for 10 minutes in the preheated oven.
7. Sprinkle parsley over the mushrooms.
8. Under broiler until browned and serve hot.
